response.justification: A seasoned full-stack engineer with 15+ years across web, backend, and embedded systems and strong TypeScript/Node and AWS experience, plus recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic workflows. However, the role demands 8+ years building production-grade AI/GenAI solutions, and the candidate's AI-specific experience is recent and limited (since 2025). There is no demonstrated depth in Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or data pipelines for unstructured data. A worthwhile screening conversation to probe the recent GenAI work, but the core required AI experience appears thin on paper.
strengths: 15+ years of senior/staff-level engineering with strong TypeScript/Node and AWS CDK experience
Recent direct work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Track record of mentoring, teaching, and engineering excellence (TDD, CI/CD, workshops)
concerns: AI/GenAI experience is recent and light, short of the required 8+ years of production AI
No demonstrated Python, RAG, or vector database experience
No evidence of data pipelines for structured/unstructured data or LLM evaluation/optimization

key_factors.factor: Senior/staff engineering breadth and cloud (AWS/TS) skills
